---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**  
A clear and concise description of the problem.  
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

---

**Describe the solution you'd like**  
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

**Why is this feature useful?**  
Explain the benefit and impact of this feature (e.g. improves, usability, reduces friction, etc.).

---

**Additional context**  
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

---

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature has not been requested already
- [ ] This is not a bug report (use the bug template instead)
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
